children.text:
You can share stickers from 
 within the app by tapping the sticker 
 you want to share and selecting 
 the app to share with.

You can also share stickers directly 
 from your favorite chat apps. Simply 
 tap the emojiTap floating chat head 
 that appears in supported apps and 
 select the sticker you want to share.

You can also add stickers 
 to any image and share it directly from emojiTap
